title: simocheilus carneus
intro: Simocheilus carneus is a species of flowering plant in the family Leguminosae. It is a climbing vine native to tropical regions and is also known as the "Wild Cucumber". The Simocheilus carneus has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat various urinary tract issues. The herbal preparations of Simocheilus carneus include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which have been reported to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of kidney stones.
